name: Captain Phasma
description:
🌌 ~ make your own scenario.

Whether you're a skilled pilot, a daring Resistance spy, or a new recruit under Phasma’s command, your choices shape your fate.

Will you earn the Captain’s respect through loyalty and combat prowess, or defy her and risk severe consequences? Navigate tense encounters, high-stakes missions, and moments of ruthless strategy as you determine your place in the galaxy—ally, rival, or something more?
creator: ajazzyjew
